response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for the role, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level positions inconsistent with an entry-level junior developer role, making them a poor fit despite broad technical exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and modern DevOps tools
concerns: Minimal or unverified Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skill is only basic, failing the mandatory communication requirement
Senior-level titles and experience far exceed entry-level role expectations
